label: Tehran
sub: Khamenei compound, Thar-Allah HQ, Rev. Court, IRIB, Armed Forces GS, Interior Ministry

label: Natanz
sub: Nuclear enrichment facility — ground-penetrating munitions

label: Fordow
sub: Underground nuclear facility — access roads and entrance hit

label: Isfahan
sub: Nuclear material buildings damaged; tunnel entrances impacted

label: Minab
sub: School airstrike — 148–180 children killed. 200ft from IRGC base.

label: Bandar Abbas
sub: Naval base — Jamaran-class corvette sunk (CENTCOM confirmed)

label: Bushehr region
sub: IRGC tanker seizure operations. Port targeted.

label: Tabriz
sub: Military infrastructure strikes reported. NW Iran.

label: Shiraz
sub: Shahid Dastghaib air base + underground ballistic missile production/storage struck Mar 13. IRIAF southern Iran hub for drone/missile operations.

label: Parchin
sub: Suspected weapons research complex. B-2 bunker busters deployed. IAEA denied pre-strike access.

label: Khorramabad
sub: Underground ballistic missile depot. Secondary explosions lasted 4 hours.

label: Chabahar
sub: Drone/missile assembly warehouse. India condemns strike near joint port project.

label: Dezful
sub: IRGC Ground Forces HQ and ballistic missile infrastructure. Multiple waves of strikes reported.

label: Kermanshah
sub: Airbase and missile production facility. F-15E sorties confirmed by CENTCOM.

label: Semnan
sub: Space launch center and ballistic missile test site. Satellite imagery shows launch pad destroyed.

label: Arak
sub: IR-40 heavy water reactor struck Day 1. Containment dome breached, IAEA monitoring equipment disabled.

label: Abadan
sub: Oil refinery near Iraqi border hit. Fire lasted 3 days; 12-mile smoke plume visible from Basra.

label: Birjand
sub: Eastern Iran drone storage and assembly facility. MQ-9 ISR confirmed 40+ Shahed-136 airframes destroyed.

label: Ahvaz
sub: IRGC Ground Forces HQ and internal security HQ struck Mar 13. Adjacent civilian neighborhood damaged; 14 civilians killed per IRNA (Mar 1 strike). Key oil region bordering Iraq.

label: Mashhad
sub: IRGC Aerospace Force HQ and ballistic missile R&D center. B-2 sortie from Diego Garcia confirmed.

label: Qom
sub: IRGC Quds Force regional HQ. Strike hit command bunker; senior Quds officer reported killed (unconfirmed).

label: Kharg Island
sub: Iran's main oil export terminal — handles ~90% of crude exports. Initial warning strikes Mar 3; full US strike on loading infrastructure Mar 14 (Pentagon 'ramp up'). Most significant economic strike of the war.

label: Dubai
sub: 137 missiles + 209 drones at UAE. Burj Al Arab fire, Jebel Ali Port fire. 3 killed, 58 injured.

label: Abu Dhabi
sub: Zayed Intl Airport hit — 1 killed, 7 injured. Etihad Towers area struck.

label: Doha
sub: 65 missiles + 12 drones. Al Udeid AB targeted. Qatar shot down 2 Su-24s. 16 injured.

label: Bahrain
sub: 5th Fleet HQ targeted. Shahed drone hit apartment. Airport struck. 4 injured.

label: Kuwait
sub: Camp Buehring drone strike — 4 US troops killed. Ali Al Salem AB attacked.

label: Erbil, Iraq
sub: 70+ missiles/drones. Airport + US Consulate targeted. Fire at air base.

label: Israel
sub: Multiple barrages. 9 killed Beit Shemesh, 777 hospitalized. Ben Gurion closed.

label: Ras Tanura
sub: Saudi refinery hit (fire contained). Prince Sultan AB targeted (intercepted).

label: Al Asad AB, Iraq
sub: PMF fires 40+ rockets. 2 US contractors killed, 11 wounded. Base partially evacuated.

label: Riyadh
sub: 4 ballistic missiles intercepted by Patriot batteries. Debris fell in residential area, 2 minor injuries.

label: Jeddah
sub: King Abdulaziz Intl Airport area targeted. 1 Shahed drone intercepted by Saudi air defense. Flights diverted 6 hours.

label: Dammam
sub: Eastern Saudi Arabia, near Aramco oil facilities. Shrapnel damage to perimeter fence; no fire. 1 worker injured.

label: Incirlik, Turkey
sub: Drone debris found near base perimeter. Origin not confirmed Iranian; Turkey investigating. No casualties.

label: Tel Aviv
sub: Multiple rocket barrages from Hezbollah. Iron Dome briefly overwhelmed in southern sector. 3 killed, 47 injured.

label: Hadera
sub: Industrial zone hit by Fateh-110 ballistic missile fragment. Chemical plant damaged; evacuation ordered for 2km radius.

label: USS Abraham Lincoln
sub: CVN-72 + CSG. F/A-18s, F-35Cs. IRGC claims hit — CENTCOM denies.

label: USS Gerald R. Ford
sub: CVN-78 + CSG-12. Eastern Mediterranean off Israel.

label: Al Udeid AB, Qatar
sub: CENTCOM forward HQ. Major air ops hub. F-15E and KC-135 operations.

label: Al Dhafra AB, UAE
sub: US air operations base. F-35A Lightning II detachment. MQ-9 Reaper ISR.

label: Camp Buehring, Kuwait
sub: 3rd ESC. Patriot batteries. 4 US troops killed here by Arash-2 drone.

label: RAF Akrotiri, Cyprus
sub: UK base. Typhoons + Storm Shadow missiles. Suspected drone hit, no casualties.

label: Diego Garcia
sub: B-2 Spirit forward operating base, Indian Ocean. GBU-57 bunker busters. Proxy position shown.

label: Camp Arifjan, Kuwait
sub: US Army Central forward HQ. Theater logistics and C2 hub. 10,000+ personnel.

label: Prince Sultan AB, Saudi
sub: US air operations center. THAAD battery deployed. F-15E Strike Eagle detachment.

label: Souda Bay, Crete
sub: US Navy support hub. Ammunition and fuel resupply for Ford CSG.

label: Incirlik AB, Turkey
sub: NATO base. Turkey denies US combat ops but allows ISR flights. KC-135 tankers.

label: Beirut
sub: Israel struck Dahiyeh suburb. Hezbollah intel chief Makled killed. 52 killed, 154 wounded in Lebanon.

label: Haifa area
sub: Hezbollah fired 6 projectiles at Mishmar HaCarmel — first attack since Nov 2024 ceasefire.

label: Strait of Hormuz
sub: De facto shutdown. IRGC says traffic "not allowed." 150+ ships anchored. 15M bbl/day normally transits.

label: Red Sea
sub: Houthi anti-ship missiles at USS Gravely. All intercepted. Houthis declare Red Sea blockade.

label: Golan Heights
sub: Israel-Syria border. Hezbollah-aligned militias probing Israeli positions. IDF deploys 36th Armored Division to border.

label: Bab el-Mandeb
sub: Houthi naval mines detected in shipping lane. Coalition minesweeping ops underway. 3 commercial vessels diverted.

label: Syria-Iraq Border
sub: PMF movement detected crossing into Syria. US MQ-9 surveillance flights increased to 24/7. CENTCOM warns of escalation.

label: Basra
sub: Iranian strikes hit Halliburton and KBR facilities; fires reported.

label: U.S. Embassy, Riyadh
sub: Two drones struck embassy; minor damage and fire reported.

label: Nakhchivan International Airport
sub: Three Iranian UAVs targeted passenger terminal; no casualties reported.

label: Port Shuaiba, Kuwait
sub: Iranian strike targeted makeshift U.S. command center; 6 U.S. service members killed.

label: Strait of Hormuz
sub: IRGC claims complete control; commercial shipping harassed.

label: Tehran (Regime Infrastructure)
sub: Broad wave of Israeli strikes targeting regime infrastructure including government ministries and IRGC command centers. Part of intensified campaign amid Trump demand for unconditional surrender.

label: Beirut (Dahiyeh)
sub: Israeli airstrikes on Beirut's southern suburbs (Dahiyeh) following mass evacuation order. Hezbollah-held areas targeted amid escalating Israel-Hezbollah hostilities.

label: Isfahan (Military Sites)
sub: Continued aerial campaign targeting Isfahan military installations. Air defense sites and missile infrastructure struck in follow-up operations.

label: USS Lincoln CSG
sub: CVN-72 enters Persian Gulf via Strait of Hormuz. Mobile Bay, Halsey, O Kane escorting.

label: Semnan Missile Test
sub: Kheibar-2 IRBM test-fired with claimed 2,000km range. Pentagon tracked trajectory over Gulf of Oman.

label: Hormuz Standoff
sub: IRGC gunboats attempted to seize US-flagged tanker MV Richmond Voyager. USS Gravely fired warning shots.

label: USS Bataan ARG
sub: Bataan Amphibious Ready Group with 26th MEU ordered to Arabian Gulf. 90+ surface combatants in CENTCOM AOR.

label: Tehran (SNSC)
sub: Supreme National Security Council convenes after Russia and China veto UNSC resolution. Iran escalates nuclear stance.

label: IRGC Hormuz Exercise
sub: Live-fire naval exercise with fast boats, anti-ship missiles, mine-laying drills. Lloyd s raises war-risk premiums 300%.

label: CENTCOM Forward HQ
sub: Combat readiness elevated after State of the Union signals imminent action against Iran.

label: Prince Sultan AB Surge
sub: Additional F-15E squadron deployed in anticipation of AUMF passage. Combat sorties pre-planned.

label: Fordow Enrichment
sub: Iran enriches to 83.7% weapons-grade threshold. IAEA inspectors expelled within 48 hours.

label: Kuwait Embassy Evacuation
sub: State Dept orders authorized departure from embassies in Iraq, Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE, Qatar.

label: Muwaffaq al-Salti AB, Jordan
sub: 24 F-15E Strike Eagles from RAF Lakenheath arrive. F-35A stealth fighters en route. Strike platform activated.

label: Tehran (SNSC Warning)
sub: Supreme National Security Council warns US: any military action met with devastating retaliation across entire region.

label: USS Lincoln (Arabian Sea)
sub: Lincoln CSG approaching Persian Gulf. State Dept demands Iran halt nuclear escalations, missile program, proxy support.

label: IRGC Missile Readiness
sub: IRGC exercises emphasizing missile capabilities. Mobile launcher movement detected near Natanz and Isfahan via satellite.

label: Natanz Air Defense
sub: S-300 batteries repositioned near Natanz. Iran declares active deterrence doctrine — shift from defensive to offensive posture.

label: Jordan F-35A Buildup
sub: F-35A deployment reaches 30 airframes at Muwaffaq al-Salti. 60+ combat aircraft now at base. Hardened shelters activated.

label: IRGC Hormuz Drills
sub: Two-day live-fire exercises in Strait of Hormuz. 20% of world oil transits here. CENTCOM monitors from nearby.

label: Jerusalem Summit
sub: Witkoff-Netanyahu meeting. Israel briefs US on Isfahan underground fortification and Iran missile arsenal intelligence.

label: Muscat, Oman
sub: US-Iran talks delegation arrives. CENTCOM commander Admiral Brad Cooper joins US negotiating team. Omani mediation.

label: Muscat Talks
sub: First US-Iran indirect talks since June 2025. Iran insists on nuclear-only agenda; US wants comprehensive framework.

label: Persian Gulf Tensions
sub: Oil markets react to inconclusive Muscat talks. War risk premiums rise 15%. Iranian crude trading at record discount.

label: Isfahan Tunnel Complex
sub: Satellite shows massive earthworks sealing tunnel entrances. Centrifuges being transferred. Iran preparing for aerial attack.

label: USS Ford (Atlantic Approach)
sub: Ford CSG begins transatlantic crossing toward Mediterranean. Unprecedented two-carrier posture developing against Iran.

label: Tehran Revolution Rally
sub: 47th Revolution anniversary. Khamenei calls for steadfastness. Pezeshkian apologizes for protest crackdown. Counter-protests continue.

label: Isfahan Nuclear Ops
sub: Massive logistics at underground tunnel complex. Iran transferring centrifuges and sealing entrances. IAEA cannot verify.

label: USS Ford (Mediterranean Bound)
sub: Trump at Fort Bragg announces regime change desirable. Ford CSG ordered to Middle East. $1 trillion military investment.

label: CENTCOM Campaign Planning
sub: US military preparing sustained weeks-long campaign. Targets include nuclear sites, state and security facilities. Retaliation expected.

label: IRGC Smart Control Drills
sub: Large-scale exercises near disputed islands. Missile-launching vessels, coastal batteries, deep-strike missile tests.

label: Hormuz Temporary Closure
sub: Iran temporarily closes Strait to commercial shipping for live-fire drills. Oil prices surge. CENTCOM calls it reckless.

label: Tehran Oil Storage Facility
sub: Israeli airstrike targeted vital oil storage facility in Tehran, marking escalation as civil infrastructure becomes a target.

label: Mehrabad International Airport
sub: Israeli airstrikes targeted Tehran's Mehrabad International Airport, reportedly used for arms transport.

label: Isfahan Military Targets
sub: U.S. and Israeli forces executed strikes on multiple targets in Isfahan, focusing on military infrastructure.

label: Bushehr Airport
sub: Israeli airstrikes damaged airport terminal and destroyed an Iran Air Airbus A319.

label: IRIB Headquarters
sub: Israeli airstrikes targeted the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting headquarters in Tehran.

label: Iranian Parliament Building
sub: Israeli airstrikes targeted Iran's parliament building in Tehran.

label: Assembly of Experts
sub: Israeli airstrikes targeted the Assembly of Experts during a meeting to elect the next supreme leader.

label: Supreme National Security Council
sub: Israeli airstrikes destroyed the Supreme National Security Council headquarters in Tehran.

label: Expediency Discernment Council
sub: Israeli airstrikes destroyed the Expediency Discernment Council building in Tehran.

label: Min Zadai Facility
sub: Israeli airstrikes targeted an underground nuclear weapons facility called Min Zadai in Tehran.

label: Shajareh Tayyebeh Elementary School
sub: U.S. airstrike hit elementary school in Minab, killing over 165 people, mostly children.

label: U.S. Embassy in Riyadh
sub: Iranian drones struck U.S. Embassy in Riyadh, causing minor damage and a small fire.

label: Nakhchivan International Airport
sub: Three Iranian UAVs targeted passenger terminal of Nakhchivan International Airport in Azerbaijan.

label: Internal Security Headquarters
sub: Israeli airstrike destroyed central command facility of Iran's internal security forces in Tehran.

label: Ahmadinejad's Residence
sub: Israeli precision strike killed former President Mahmoud Ahmadinejad at his residence in Tehran.

label: Police Station in Tehran
sub: U.S.-Israeli strike targeted police station in Tehran, causing significant damage.

label: Grand Bazaar
sub: U.S.-Israeli airstrikes damaged Tehran's Grand Bazaar, a significant cultural and economic site.

label: Golestan Palace
sub: U.S.-Israeli airstrikes damaged Golestan Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage site in Tehran.

label: Hospital in Tehran
sub: U.S.-Israeli airstrikes hit a hospital in Tehran, resulting in civilian casualties.

label: School in Tehran
sub: U.S.-Israeli airstrikes hit a school in Tehran, causing civilian casualties.

label: Air Defense Systems in Tehran
sub: Israeli military claimed destruction of advanced Iranian air defense systems in Tehran.

label: Ballistic Missile Launchers in Tehran
sub: U.S. B-2 bombers destroyed buried Iranian ballistic missile launch facilities in Tehran.

label: Hezbollah Command Centers in Beirut
sub: Israeli airstrikes targeted multiple Hezbollah command centers in Beirut.

label: Tripoli, Northern Lebanon
sub: Israeli airstrikes hit the city of Tripoli for the first time in the conflict.

label: Iranian Naval Vessels in Gulf of Oman
sub: U.S. forces sank over 30 Iranian ships, including a drone carrier set ablaze.

label: Halliburton Oil Facilities in Basra
sub: Iranian missile strikes set U.S.-based Halliburton and KBR facilities ablaze in Basra, Iraq.

label: Missile Barrage on Israel
sub: Iran launched multiple missiles targeting Israel; interceptions reported.

label: Drone Strikes on Gulf States
sub: Iran intensified drone and missile attacks on Bahrain, causing massive damage to a refinery.

label: Hezbollah Missile Attacks on Israel
sub: Hezbollah launched multiple missiles from Lebanon into Israel; Israeli airstrikes followed.

label: UAV Attack on Azerbaijan
sub: Three Iranian UAVs targeted the passenger terminal of Nakhchivan International Airport.

label: IRGC Air Force HQ
sub: IDF destroyed IRGC Air Force headquarters and IRGC Space & Satellite Command — the ballistic missile command center. 50 ammo bunkers also destroyed.

label: Kish Island Airport Fuel Depot
sub: Israeli strike destroyed fuel depot at Kish Island airport. Iranian naval ship Bandar Lengeh also destroyed in port of Bandar Abbas.

label: Bapco Refinery, Bahrain (Sitra)
sub: Iranian UAV struck Bapco Energies refinery. Company declared force majeure. At least 32 injured including children from strikes on Sitra island.

label: Fujairah Oil Facility, UAE
sub: Iranian strike ignited fire at oil facility in Fujairah. UAE air defenses remained active against ongoing missile and drone threats.

label: Beirut (Ghobeiry) — Quds Force Meeting
sub: Israeli strike on hotel in Ghobeiry, Beirut targeting a meeting of five IRGC Quds Force commanders. Major explosion reported.

label: Al-Kharj, Saudi Arabia
sub: Iranian projectile killed 2 civilians (Indian, Bangladeshi nationals) in Al-Kharj. IRGC claimed target was radar systems. Saudi forces intercepted UAVs targeting Shaybah oil field.

label: Qatar (17 missiles intercepted)
sub: Qatar intercepted all 17 ballistic missiles and 6 drones from Iran. Air raid alerts at 03:15 local. No casualties or damage. Video released by Ministry of Defence.

label: Shaybah Oil Field, Saudi Arabia
sub: Saudi Arabia intercepted Iranian UAVs heading toward the Shaybah oil field. No damage reported.

label: Persian Gulf Tanker Strike Zone
sub: IRGC drone/missile attacks on commercial shipping. 6 vessels struck Mar 11–12. ~500 tankers stranded in Persian Gulf. Iran claiming US-owned tanker hit near Iraqi waters.

label: Iraq Southern Ports — Tankers Hit
sub: Two oil tankers struck near Iraq's southern ports on March 12 — first such strikes in Iraqi waters since the war began.

label: Oman — Fuel Depot Fire
sub: Emergency crews battled fire at fuel storage tanks in Oman port after Iranian drone strike confirmed by video. March 12, 2026.

label: Ahvaz — IRGC Drone Command HQ
sub: Ali Akbar Drone Base cratered by IDF. IRGC Aerospace Force drone command center destroyed in Khuzestan Province.

label: Iranian Airfields (6 Struck)
sub: IDF struck 6 Iranian military airfields, destroyed 16 Quds Force transport aircraft and combat helicopters. Runways cratered.

label: Gaziantep, Turkey — NATO Intercept
sub: Second Iranian ballistic missile intercepted by NATO integrated air defense over Sahinbey district, Gaziantep. No casualties.

label: Tehran — Aghdasieh Fuel Depot
sub: Israeli airstrike on Aghdasieh oil warehouse in NE Tehran. Part of 4 fuel depot strikes killing 40. Toxic black rain over city of 10M.

label: Tehran — Shahran Oil Depot
sub: Israeli strike on Shahran oil depot north/west of Tehran. Thick black toxic smoke hung over city causing breathing difficulties.

label: Karaj — Fuel Depot
sub: Israeli strike on oil depot in Karaj city, Alborz Province. Oil-tainted rainfall staining buildings in surrounding area.

label: Yehud, Israel — Cluster Warhead Strike
sub: Iranian ballistic missile with cluster warhead killed 2 civilians in Yehud, wounded dozens. 14 total Israeli civilians killed since Feb 28.

label: Strait of Hormuz — Mine Field
sub: Iran confirmed laying mines in Strait of Hormuz. Few dozen mines deployed. Ship transits down 95% (55 vs 160 prior week). US destroyed 16 mine-laying vessels.

label: Jordan — 119 Missiles/Drones
sub: Jordan targeted by 119 Iranian missiles (60) and drones (59). 108 intercepted, 14 people injured. Jordan activated defense pacts.

label: Beirut — 4 Iranian Diplomats Killed
sub: Israeli airstrike killed 4 Iranian diplomats. Iran called it 'terrorist attack' at UNSC. 8 total killed, 31 injured in Dahieh/central Beirut.

label: Muharraq, Bahrain — Fuel Tanks
sub: Iranian strike on fuel tanks in Muharraq Governorate. Residents told to stay inside and close windows. Cumulative: 281 projectiles on Bahrain.

label: Jerusalem — Missile Near Old City
sub: Iranian missile struck few hundred meters from Old City, Western Wall, Al-Aqsa Mosque, Church of Holy Sepulchre. Prayer suspended at all holy sites.

label: Port of Salalah, Oman — Oil Storage
sub: Iranian drones struck oil storage at Port of Salalah, Oman's largest facility. Emergency crews battled fire at fuel tanks. Confirmed by Ambrey and Omani media.

label: Mala Qara, Iraq — French Base
sub: Iranian drone strike on French base in Iraqi Kurdistan. 1 French soldier killed, 6 injured. First French combat fatality. Announced by Macron.

label: KC-135 Crash Site — Western Iraq
sub: US Air Force KC-135 tanker crashed in western Iraq supporting Iran ops. 6 crew missing. Not due to hostile fire per CENTCOM; Islamic Resistance in Iraq claims shootdown. First KC-135 loss in 13 years.

label: Palmachim Airbase — Iran Strike
sub: Iranian IRGC targeted Palmachim Airbase (Israel) in 'most intense operation since beginning of war.' Advanced ballistic missiles deployed. 58 Israelis hospitalized.

label: Ovda Airbase (Negev) — Iran Strike
sub: IRGC claimed targeting of Ovda Air Base in southern Israel's Negev desert as part of most intense missile barrage of the war.

label: Basra — Tanker Attack (Iraqi Waters)
sub: Iran underwater drones struck MV Safesea Vishnu (US-owned, Marshall Islands) and MV Zefyros in Iraqi territorial waters near Basra. 1 Indian crew member killed, 25 rescued. First oil-strike in Iraqi waters. Iraq oil terminals suspended.

label: Kuwait International Airport — Drone Attack
sub: Iranian drones targeted Kuwait International Airport causing material damage. 6 electricity transmission lines disrupted after intercepted drone debris struck power infrastructure.

label: Baghdad — US Embassy Helipad Hit
sub: Missile struck US Embassy Baghdad helipad, destroying the facility's air defense system. No US fatalities reported. First direct strike on the US Embassy compound during the conflict.

label: Tel Nof AB — 6th Wave Strike
sub: IRGC 6th wave targeted Tel Nof Airbase (IAF F-35I squadrons), Israeli Military GHQ, and Tel Aviv defense industry. Sirens across central Israel. Cluster fragments struck Tel Aviv streets.

label: Dubai Int'l Airport — Fuel Tank Drone Strike
sub: Iranian Shahed drone struck fuel storage tank near Dubai International Airport. Large fire ignited. Emirates airline suspended all flights. Resumed after several hours.

label: Abu Dhabi — Missile Kills Civilian
sub: Iranian ballistic missile struck a car in Abu Dhabi, killing a Palestinian resident. Second civilian fatality in Abu Dhabi during the conflict.

label: Kuwait City — US Embassy Missile Strike
sub: Iranian ballistic missile struck US Embassy compound in Kuwait City. Rubio ordered closure and evacuation to Bahrain. Second direct hit on a US diplomatic facility during the conflict.

label: Tehran — IDF F-35I Shoots Down Yak-130
sub: IDF F-35I 'Adir' shot down an Iranian Yak-130 fighter jet over Tehran — historic first stealth-vs-manned aerial kill in combat. Wreckage fell in Tehran suburbs.

label: Ramat Gan — Cluster Missile Kills Elderly Couple
sub: Iranian ballistic missile carrying cluster warhead struck Ramat Gan suburb of Tel Aviv, killing a couple in their 70s — the first confirmed Israeli civilian fatalities from cluster munitions in the conflict. 8 shrapnel impact sites across greater Tel Aviv. IRGC cited 'revenge for Larijani's killing.'

label: Bachoura, Beirut — IDF Airstrike
sub: IDF airstrike on Bachoura neighborhood of central Beirut — densely populated area. Part of broader IDF operations against Hezbollah targets on Day 19. IDF also issued formal evacuation warnings for Tyre (southern Lebanon) and struck Bekaa Valley infrastructure.

label: UAE Shah Gas Field — Iranian Drone Strike
sub: Iranian drone struck the UAE's Shah Gas Field, prompting suspension of operations — the first direct attack on a producing UAE energy field during the conflict. No direct casualties confirmed. Adds to broader Iranian pressure on Gulf energy infrastructure.

label: South Pars Gas Field — First Upstream Strike
sub: Israel struck South Pars gas field (world's largest natural gas reserve, shared with Qatar) on March 18–19 — the first direct attack on Iran's upstream oil and gas extraction infrastructure. Brent crude spiked back to ~$108–110/bbl after the strike.

label: Tehran — Intel Minister Khatib Killed
sub: Israel killed Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib in a targeted strike. Adds to the decapitation campaign that has eliminated Khamenei, Larijani, Soleimani (Basij), and multiple IRGC commanders.

label: USS Tripoli ARG (Near Singapore)
sub: America-class USS Tripoli ARG with 31st MEU (~2,200 Marines) tracked near Singapore March 17 heading toward the Middle East. Could support mine countermeasures in Hormuz or reinforce Gulf posture.
